cycle: methodology follow-through — expert-protection lever measured on REAL v5
headline: NO-TRAIN WIN: protecting top-8/64 experts/layer bf16 (12%) raises v5 shippable coverage 0.8594 -> 0.9297 (abstention 14% -> 7%), still clears the 0.97-answered target. Harness-verified (baseline reproduces the cert's 0.9219 @ cov 0.8594 exactly).

result.method: reused cert load_merged_model + collect_next_token_probs + quant_abstention_frontier on real merged v5; per-slice protected quant custom (guard KEPT-BF16-OK); n_eval=256.

recommendation: Ship v5 + top-8-expert-protection + abstention -> answer ~93% of tokens at answered-top1 ~0.975, NO retrain. Stacks on the conformal-abstention-serve recipe cloud is adopting (fe0acf23). Productionize: add opt-in --keep-top-experts N to certify_lowram.py (routing-freq precompute + per-slice fused-expert skip; ~40 lines, additive/default-off).
methodology: docs/06-Roadmap/2026-07-01-nvfp4-lever-portfolio-methodology.md (work branch, @6d459e84): measure-first lever portfolio. Refuted expert-mixed-precision-by-weight + RHT-on-weights (uniform ~10.8% weight error); found routing skew (top-8/layer=27.8%) -> this protection win. v6 QAD only to push coverage past ~93%. Retire the lambda knob-turn.
guardrailsAck: canClaimAGI=false (raw v5 still FAILS 0.97 full-coverage; shippable via abstention+protection is MEASURED n=256, not a per-token proof); lint_claims OK; no plaintext secrets; JUDGE_HOLD set+cleared around each GPU probe; code doc-only to work branch.
needsFromOwner: Approve productionizing an opt-in --keep-top-experts in the cert so the ship config is reproducible? (Measurement done; this just wires it in.)
